text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "svchost.exe is modifying Windows Firewall rules to allow inbound connections for a Python executable located in a user's AppData directory. While svchost.exe manages firewall services, directly creating inbound rules for a non-system, user-installed application in this manner is unusual and could indicate a compromised service or an attempt to bypass firewall for malicious purposes.",
  "indicators": [
    "firewall rule modification",
    "inbound connection",
    "user-installed executable",
    "python.exe",
    "appdata directory"
  ]
}
